title: Visenia velutina
taxonomy: Visenia velutina is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It belongs to the genus Visenia, which is part of the order Myrtales. Within the Myrtaceae family, Visenia velutina is a relatively rare species. Its classification is closely related to other Myrtaceae species, such as the eucalyptus trees. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally agreed upon that Visenia velutina belongs to the Myrtaceae family.
